name: TreeRoot
description:
Groups all parts of the tree.
Renders a `<div>` element.

actionsRef.description: A ref to imperative actions on the tree.

checkboxSelectionPropagation.description:
Controls how selecting a `Tree.CheckboxItem` propagates through the tree hierarchy.
This does not affect `Tree.Item` interactions (which use replace-selection semantics).

When `checkboxSelectionPropagation.descendants` is set to `true`:
- Selecting a parent selects all its descendants automatically.
- Deselecting a parent deselects all its descendants automatically.

When `checkboxSelectionPropagation.parents` is set to `true`:
- Selecting all descendants of a parent selects the parent automatically.
- Deselecting a descendant of a selected parent deselects the parent automatically.

defaultExpandedItems.description:
The items that are initially expanded.

To render a controlled tree, use the `expandedItems` prop instead.

defaultSelectedItems.description:
The items that are initially selected.

To render a controlled tree, use the `selectedItems` prop instead.

disallowEmptySelection.description:
Whether the tree disallows having no selected item.
When `true`, at least one item must remain selected at all times.

expandOnClick.description:
Whether clicking anywhere on an item row toggles expansion.
When `false`, only `Tree.ItemExpansionTrigger` can expand items.

expandedItems.description:
The expanded items.

To render an uncontrolled tree, use the `defaultExpandedItems` prop instead.

isItemDisabled.description: Used to determine if a given item should be disabled.

isItemSelectionDisabled.description: Used to determine if a given item should have selection disabled.

itemFocusableWhenDisabled.description: Whether disabled items should be focusable.

itemToChildren.description: Used to determine the children of a given item.

itemToId.description: Used to determine the id of a given item.

itemToStringLabel.description: Used to determine the string label of a given item.

items.description:
The items to render.
Each item must have a unique identifier.

lazyLoading.description: The lazy loading plugin instance, used to load items on demand when expanding a parent item.
lazyLoading.detailedType:
| {
    attach: attach
    onBeforeExpand: onBeforeExpand
    updateItemChildren: updateItemChildren
    destroy: destroy
  }
| undefined

onExpandedItemsChange.description: Event handler called when items are expanded or collapsed.
onExpandedItemsChange.detailedType:
| ((
    expandedItems: string[],
    eventDetails: Tree.Root.ExpansionChangeEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

onItemExpansionToggle.type: ((itemId: string, isExpanded: boolean, details: Tree.Item.ExpansionToggleEventDetails) => void)
onItemExpansionToggle.description: Event handler called when an item is expanded or collapsed.
onItemExpansionToggle.detailedType:
| ((
    itemId: string,
    isExpanded: boolean,
    details: Tree.Item.ExpansionToggleEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

onItemFocus.description: Event handler called when an item is focused.
onItemFocus.detailedType:
| ((
    itemId: string,
    details: Tree.Item.FocusEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

onItemSelectionToggle.type: ((itemId: string, isSelected: boolean, details: Tree.Item.SelectionToggleEventDetails) => void)
onItemSelectionToggle.description: Event handler called when an item is selected or deselected.
onItemSelectionToggle.detailedType:
| ((
    itemId: string,
    isSelected: boolean,
    details: Tree.Item.SelectionToggleEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

onSelectedItemsChange.type: ((selectedItems: string[] | string | any | null, eventDetails: Tree.Root.SelectionChangeEventDetails) => void)
onSelectedItemsChange.description: Event handler called when the selected items change.
onSelectedItemsChange.detailedType:
| ((
    selectedItems: string[] | string | any | null,
    eventDetails: Tree.Root.SelectionChangeEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

selectedItems.description:
The selected items.

To render an uncontrolled tree, use the `defaultSelectedItems` prop instead.

selectionMode.description:
The selection mode of the tree.
Use `'single'` for single selection, `'multiple'` for multiple selection.

virtualized.description: Whether the items are being externally virtualized.

disabled.description: Whether the component should ignore user interaction.

children.description:
The render function for each tree item, or a `Tree.ItemList` / `Tree.AnimatedItemList`
element for more control over item rendering.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Tree.Root.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-disabled.description: Present when the tree is disabled.
